tEn: Retentive Network: A Successor to Transformer for Large Language Models
tZh: Retentive Network：大型语言模型中Transformer的继任者
sEn: RetNet achieves training parallelism, low-cost O(1) inference, and good performance, making it a strong successor to Transformer for large language models.
sZh: RetNet实现了训练并行性、低成本O(1)推理和良好性能，成为大型语言模型中Transformer的有力继任者。
absEn: In this work, we propose Retentive Network (RetNet) as a foundation architecture for large language models, simultaneously achieving training parallelism, low-cost inference, and good performance. We theoretically derive the connection between recurrence and attention. Then we propose the retention mechanism for sequence modeling, which supports three computation paradigms, i.e., parallel, recurrent, and chunkwise recurrent. Specifically, the parallel representation allows for training parallelism. The recurrent representation enables low-cost $O(1)$ inference, which improves decoding throughput, latency, and GPU memory without sacrificing performance. The chunkwise recurrent representation facilitates efficient long-sequence modeling with linear complexity, where each chunk is encoded parallelly while recurrently summarizing the chunks. Experimental results on language modeling show that RetNet achieves favorable scaling results, parallel training, low-cost deployment, and efficient inference. The intriguing properties make RetNet a strong successor to Transformer for large language models. Code will be available at https://aka.ms/retnet.
absZh: 在这项工作中，我们提出Retentive Network（RetNet）作为大型语言模型的基础架构，同时实现了训练并行性、低成本推理和良好性能。我们从理论上推导了循环和注意力之间的联系。然后，我们提出了用于序列建模的保留机制，该机制支持三种计算范式，即并行、循环和分块循环。具体来说，并行表示允许训练并行性。循环表示实现了低成本的O(1)推理，在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了解码吞吐量、延迟和GPU内存。分块循环表示以线性复杂度实现高效的长序列建模，其中每个块并行编码，同时循环汇总块。语言建模的实验结果表明，RetNet实现了良好的扩展结果、并行训练、低成本部署和高效推理。这些有趣的特性使RetNet成为大型语言模型中Transformer的有力继任者。代码将在https://aka.ms/retnet提供。

contrib.en: Proposes Retentive Network (RetNet) as a foundation architecture for large language models, achieving training parallelism, low-cost inference, and good performance.
contrib.zh: 提出Retentive Network（RetNet）作为大型语言模型的基础架构，同时实现训练并行性、低成本推理和良好性能。

contrib.en: Introduces a multi-scale retention mechanism with three computation paradigms: parallel, recurrent, and chunkwise recurrent.
contrib.zh: 引入多尺度保留机制，支持并行、循环和分块循环三种计算范式。

contrib.en: Theoretically derives the connection between recurrence and attention, enabling dual-form sequence modeling.
contrib.zh: 从理论上推导了循环与注意力机制之间的联系，实现了双形式序列建模。

contrib.en: Demonstrates O(1) inference complexity, significantly reducing memory and latency compared to Transformers.
contrib.zh: 展示了O(1)推理复杂度，与Transformer相比显著降低内存和延迟。

contrib.en: Achieves competitive language modeling performance and favorable scaling results across model sizes.
contrib.zh: 在语言建模中取得有竞争力的性能，并在不同模型规模下呈现良好的缩放结果。

contrib.en: Provides efficient long-sequence modeling via chunkwise recurrent representation with linear complexity.
contrib.zh: 通过线性复杂度的分块循环表示实现高效的长序列建模。

limits.en: RetNet's training efficiency relies on chunkwise recurrent representation, which may require careful tuning of chunk size.
limits.zh: RetNet的训练效率依赖于分块循环表示，可能需要仔细调整块大小。

limits.en: The retention mechanism uses complex-valued operations, potentially increasing implementation complexity.
limits.zh: 保留机制使用复数运算，可能增加实现复杂度。

limits.en: Performance gains over Transformers are more pronounced at larger model sizes; smaller models may not benefit as much.
limits.zh: 与Transformer相比，性能提升在较大模型规模时更显著；较小模型可能获益较少。

limits.en: The study does not explore scaling beyond 6.7B parameters or training beyond 100B tokens.
limits.zh: 研究未探索超过6.7B参数或100B token的训练规模。

limits.en: RetNet's inference speed advantage is demonstrated on specific hardware; generalization to other platforms may vary.
limits.zh: RetNet的推理速度优势在特定硬件上展示；推广到其他平台可能有所不同。

items.en: In this work, we propose Retentive Network (RetNet) as a foundation architecture for large language models, simultaneously achieving training parallelism, low-cost inference, and good performance. We theoretically derive the connection between recurrence and attention. Then we propose the retention mechanism for sequence modeling, which supports three computation paradigms, i.e., parallel, recurrent, and chunkwise recurrent. Specifically, the parallel representation allows for training parallelism. The recurrent representation enables low-cost O​(1)𝑂1O(1) inference, which improves decoding throughput, latency, and GPU memory without sacrificing performance. The chunkwise recurrent representation facilitates efficient long-sequence modeling with linear complexity, where each chunk is encoded parallelly while recurrently summarizing the chunks. Experimental results on language modeling show that RetNet achieves favorable scaling results, parallel training, low-cost deployment, and efficient inference. The intriguing properties make RetNet a strong successor to Transformer for large language models. Code will be available at https://aka.ms/retnet.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出Retentive Network（RetNet）作为大型语言模型的基础架构，同时实现了训练并行性、低成本推理和良好性能。我们从理论上推导了循环与注意力机制之间的联系。然后，我们提出了用于序列建模的保留机制，该机制支持三种计算范式，即并行、循环和分块循环。具体而言，并行表示允许训练并行性。循环表示实现了低成本的O(1)推理，在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了解码吞吐量、延迟和GPU内存。分块循环表示以线性复杂度实现高效的长序列建模，其中每个块被并行编码，同时循环地汇总各块。语言建模的实验结果表明，RetNet实现了良好的缩放结果、并行训练、低成本部署和高效推理。这些引人注目的特性使RetNet成为Transformer在大型语言模型中的有力继承者。代码将在https://aka.ms/retnet提供。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Retentive network (RetNet) achieves low-cost inference (i.e., GPU memory, throughput, and latency), training parallelism, and favorable scaling curves compared with Transformer. Results of inference cost are reported with 8k as input length. Figure 6 shows more results on different sequence lengths.
items.capZh: 图1：与Transformer相比，Retentive Network（RetNet）实现了低成本推理（即GPU内存、吞吐量和延迟）、训练并行性和良好的缩放曲线。推理成本的结果以8k输入长度报告。图6显示了不同序列长度上的更多结果。

items.en: The only way to discover the limits of the possible is to go beyond them into the impossible.
items.zh: 发现可能性极限的唯一方法是超越它们进入不可能。

items.capEn: Figure 2: RetNet makes the “impossible triangle” possible, which achieves training parallelism, good performance, and low inference cost simultaneously.
items.capZh: 图2：RetNet使“不可能三角”成为可能，同时实现了训练并行性、良好性能和低推理成本。

items.en: Transformer [34] has become the de facto architecture for large language models [2], which was initially proposed to overcome the sequential training issue of recurrent models [15]. However, training parallelism of Transformers is at the cost of inefficient inference, because of the O​(N)𝑂𝑁O(N) complexity per step and memory-bound key-value cache [30], which renders Transformers unfriendly to deployment. The growing sequence length increases GPU memory consumption as well as latency and reduces inference speed.
items.zh: Transformer [34]已成为大型语言模型的事实标准架构[2]，最初是为了克服循环模型的顺序训练问题而提出的[15]。然而，Transformer的训练并行性是以低效推理为代价的，因为每步的O(N)复杂度和内存受限的键值缓存[30]，这使得Transformer对部署不友好。不断增长的序列长度增加了GPU内存消耗以及延迟，并降低了推理速度。

items.en: Numerous efforts have continued to develop the next-generation architecture, aiming at retaining training parallelism and competitive performance as Transformers while having efficient O​(1)𝑂1O(1) inference. It is challenging to achieve the above goals simultaneously, i.e., the so-called “impossible triangle” as shown in Figure 2.
items.zh: 许多努力持续开发下一代架构，旨在保持Transformer的训练并行性和竞争性能，同时实现高效的O(1)推理。同时实现上述目标具有挑战性，即所谓的“不可能三角”，如图2所示。

items.en: There have been three main strands of research. First, linearized attention [19] approximates standard attention scores exp⁡(𝒒⋅𝒌)⋅𝒒𝒌\exp({\bm{q}}\cdot{\bm{k}}) with kernels ϕ​(𝒒)⋅ϕ​(𝒌)⋅italic-ϕ𝒒italic-ϕ𝒌\phi({\bm{q}})\cdot\phi({\bm{k}}), so that autoregressive inference can be rewritten in a recurrent form. However, the modeling capability and performance are worse than Transformers, which hinders the method’s popularity. The second strand returns to recurrent models for efficient inference while sacrificing training parallelism. As a remedy, element-wise operators [25] are used for acceleration, however, representation capacity and performance are harmed. The third line of research explores replacing attention with other mechanisms, such as S4 [11], and its variants [8, 26]. None of the previous work can break through the impossible triangle, resulting in no clear winner compared with Transformers.
items.zh: 已有三个主要研究方向。首先，线性化注意力[19]使用核φ(q)·φ(k)近似标准注意力分数exp(q·k)，使得自回归推理可以重写为循环形式。然而，建模能力和性能不如Transformer，这阻碍了该方法的普及。第二个方向回归循环模型以实现高效推理，但牺牲了训练并行性。作为一种补救措施，使用逐元素算子[25]进行加速，但表示能力和性能受到损害。第三个研究方向探索用其他机制替代注意力，例如S4 [11]及其变体[8, 26]。先前的工作均未能突破不可能三角，因此与Transformer相比没有明确的赢家。

items.en: In this work, we propose retentive networks (RetNet), achieving low-cost inference, efficient long-sequence modeling, Transformer-comparable performance, and parallel model training simultaneously. Specifically, we introduce a multi-scale retention mechanism to substitute multi-head attention, which has three computation paradigms, i.e., parallel, recurrent, and chunkwise recurrent representations. First, the parallel representation empowers training parallelism to utilize GPU devices fully. Second, the recurrent representation enables efficient O​(1)𝑂1O(1) inference in terms of memory and computation. The deployment cost and latency can be significantly reduced. Moreover, the implementation is greatly simplified without key-value cache tricks. Third, the chunkwise recurrent representation can perform efficient long-sequence modeling. We parallelly encode each local block for computation speed while recurrently encoding the global blocks to save GPU memory.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出Retentive Network（RetNet），同时实现了低成本推理、高效长序列建模、与Transformer相当的性能以及并行模型训练。具体而言，我们引入了一种多尺度保留机制来替代多头注意力，该机制具有三种计算范式，即并行、循环和分块循环表示。首先，并行表示支持训练并行性，以充分利用GPU设备。其次，循环表示在内存和计算方面实现了高效的O(1)推理。部署成本和延迟可以显著降低。此外，实现大大简化，无需键值缓存技巧。第三，分块循环表示可以执行高效的长序列建模。我们并行编码每个局部块以提高计算速度，同时循环编码全局块以节省GPU内存。

items.en: We conduct extensive experiments to compare RetNet with Transformer and its variants. Experimental results on language modeling show that RetNet is consistently competitive in terms of both scaling curves and in-context learning. Moreover, the inference cost of RetNet is length-invariant. For a 7B model and 8k sequence length, RetNet decodes 8.4×\times faster and saves 70% of memory than Transformers with key-value caches. During training, RetNet also achieves 25-50% memory saving and 7×\times acceleration than standard Transformer and an advantage towards highly-optimized FlashAttention [7]. Besides, RetNet’s inference latency is insensitive to batch size, allowing enormous throughput. The intriguing properties make RetNet a strong successor to Transformer for large language models.
items.zh: 我们进行了大量实验，将RetNet与Transformer及其变体进行比较。语言建模的实验结果表明，RetNet在缩放曲线和上下文学习方面始终具有竞争力。此外，RetNet的推理成本与长度无关。对于7B模型和8k序列长度，RetNet解码速度比带键值缓存的Transformer快8.4倍，节省70%的内存。在训练期间，RetNet比标准Transformer节省25-50%的内存并加速7倍，并且相对于高度优化的FlashAttention [7]具有优势。此外，RetNet的推理延迟对批量大小不敏感，允许巨大的吞吐量。这些引人注目的特性使RetNet成为Transformer在大型语言模型中的有力继承者。

items.en: Retentive network (RetNet) is stacked with L𝐿L identical blocks, which follows a similar layout (i.e., residual connection, and pre-LayerNorm) as in Transformer [34]. Each RetNet block contains two modules: a multi-scale retention (MSR) module, and a feed-forward network (FFN) module. We introduce the MSR module in the following sections. Given an input sequence x=x1​⋯​x|x|𝑥subscript𝑥1⋯subscript𝑥𝑥x=x_{1}\cdots x_{|x|}, RetNet encodes the sequence in an autoregressive way. The input vectors {𝒙i}i=1|x|superscriptsubscriptsubscript𝒙𝑖𝑖1𝑥\{{\bm{x}}_{i}\}_{i=1}^{|x|} is first packed into X0=[𝒙1,⋯,𝒙|x|]∈ℝ|x|×dmodelsuperscript𝑋0subscript𝒙1⋯subscript𝒙𝑥superscriptℝ𝑥subscript𝑑modelX^{0}=[{\bm{x}}_{1},\cdots,{\bm{x}}_{|x|}]\in\mathbb{R}^{|x|\times d_{\text{model}}}, where dmodelsubscript𝑑modeld_{\text{model}} is hidden dimension. Then we compute contextualized vector representations Xl=RetNetl​(Xl−1),l∈[1,L]formulae-sequencesuperscript𝑋𝑙subscriptRetNet𝑙superscript𝑋𝑙1𝑙1𝐿X^{l}=\mathrm{RetNet}_{l}(X^{l-1}),l\in[1,L].
items.zh: Retentive Network（RetNet）由L个相同块堆叠而成，其布局（即残差连接和预层归一化）与Transformer [34]类似。每个RetNet块包含两个模块：多尺度保留（MSR）模块和前馈网络（FFN）模块。我们在以下部分介绍MSR模块。给定输入序列x = x1 ... x|x|，RetNet以自回归方式编码序列。输入向量{xi}i=1|x|首先被打包成X^0 = [x1, ..., x|x|] ∈ ℝ^{|x|×d_model}，其中d_model是隐藏维度。然后我们计算上下文向量表示X^l = RetNet_l(X^{l-1}), l ∈ [1, L]。

items.en: In this section, we introduce the retention mechanism that has a dual form of recurrence and parallelism. So we can train the models in a parallel way while recurrently conducting inference.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们介绍具有循环和并行双重形式的保留机制。因此，我们可以以并行方式训练模型，同时以循环方式进行推理。

items.en: Given input X∈ℝ|x|×dmodel𝑋superscriptℝ𝑥subscript𝑑modelX\in\mathbb{R}^{|x|\times d_{\text{model}}}, we project it to one-dimensional function v​(n)=Xn⋅𝒘V𝑣𝑛⋅subscript𝑋𝑛subscript𝒘𝑉v(n)=X_{n}\cdot{\bm{w}}_{V}. Consider a sequence modeling problem that maps v​(n)↦o​(n)maps-to𝑣𝑛𝑜𝑛v(n)\mapsto o(n) through states 𝒔nsubscript𝒔𝑛{\bm{s}}_{n}. Let vn,onsubscript𝑣𝑛subscript𝑜𝑛v_{n},o_{n} denote v​(n),o​(n)𝑣𝑛𝑜𝑛v(n),o(n) for simplicity. We formulate the mapping in a recurrent manner:
items.zh: 给定输入X ∈ ℝ^{|x|×d_model}，我们将其投影到一维函数v(n) = X_n · w_V。考虑一个序列建模问题，通过状态s_n将v(n)映射到o(n)。为简单起见，令v_n, o_n表示v(n), o(n)。我们以循环方式表述映射：

items.en: where we map vnsubscript𝑣𝑛v_{n} to the state vector 𝒔nsubscript𝒔𝑛{\bm{s}}_{n}, and then implement a linear transform to encode sequence information recurrently.
items.zh: 其中我们将v_n映射到状态向量s_n，然后实现线性变换以循环编码序列信息。

items.en: Next, we make the projection Qn,Knsubscript𝑄𝑛subscript𝐾𝑛Q_{n},K_{n} content-aware:
items.zh: 接下来，我们使投影Q_n, K_n具有内容感知性：

items.en: where WQ,WK∈ℝd×dsubscript𝑊𝑄subscript𝑊𝐾superscriptℝ𝑑𝑑W_{Q},W_{K}\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times d} are learnable matrices.
items.zh: 其中W_Q, W_K ∈ ℝ^{d×d}是可学习矩阵。

items.en: We diagonalize the matrix A=Λ​(γ​ei​θ)​Λ−1𝐴Λ𝛾superscript𝑒𝑖𝜃superscriptΛ1A=\Lambda(\gamma e^{i\theta})\Lambda^{-1}, where γ,θ∈ℝd𝛾𝜃superscriptℝ𝑑\gamma,\theta\in\mathbb{R}^{d}. Then we obtain An−m=Λ​(γ​ei​θ)n−m​Λ−1superscript𝐴𝑛𝑚Λsuperscript𝛾superscript𝑒𝑖𝜃𝑛𝑚superscriptΛ1A^{n-m}=\Lambda(\gamma e^{i\theta})^{n-m}\Lambda^{-1}. By absorbing ΛΛ\Lambda into WQsubscript𝑊𝑄W_{Q} and WKsubscript𝑊𝐾W_{K}, we can rewrite Equation (LABEL:eq:rnn) as:
items.zh: 我们将矩阵A对角化为A = Λ(γ e^{iθ})Λ^{-1}，其中γ, θ ∈ ℝ^d。然后我们得到A^{n-m} = Λ(γ e^{iθ})^{n-m}Λ^{-1}。通过将Λ吸收到W_Q和W_K中，我们可以将方程(LABEL:eq:rnn)重写为：

We further simplify γ𝛾\gamma as a scalar, Equation (3) becomes:

items.en: where † is the conjugate transpose. The formulation is easily parallelizable within training instances.
items.zh: 其中†是共轭转置。该公式在训练实例中易于并行化。

items.en: In summary, we start with recurrent modeling as shown in Equation (LABEL:eq:rnn), and then derive its parallel formulation in Equation (4). We consider the original mapping v​(n)↦o​(n)maps-to𝑣𝑛𝑜𝑛v(n)\mapsto o(n) as vectors and obtain the retention mechanism as follows.
items.zh: 总之，我们从方程(LABEL:eq:rnn)所示的循环建模开始，然后推导出方程(4)中的并行公式。我们将原始映射v(n) → o(n)视为向量，并得到如下保留机制。

items.en: As shown in Figure 3(a), the retention layer is defined as:
items.zh: 如图3(a)所示，保留层定义为：

items.en: where Θ¯¯Θ\overline{\Theta} is the complex conjugate of ΘΘ\Theta, and D∈ℝ|x|×|x|𝐷superscriptℝ𝑥𝑥D\in\mathbb{R}^{|x|\times|x|} combines causal masking and exponential decay along relative distance as one matrix. Similar to self-attention, the parallel representation enables us to train the models with GPUs efficiently.
items.zh: 其中Θ‾是Θ的复共轭，D∈ℝ|x|×|x|将因果掩码和沿相对距离的指数衰减合并为一个矩阵。与自注意力机制类似，并行表示使我们能够高效地使用GPU训练模型。

items.en: As shown in Figure 3(b), the proposed mechanism can also be written as recurrent neural networks (RNNs), which is favorable for inference. For the n𝑛n-th timestep, we recurrently obtain the output as:
items.zh: 如图3(b)所示，所提出的机制也可以写成递归神经网络（RNN），这有利于推理。对于第n个时间步，我们递归地获得输出为：

items.en: where Q,K,V,γ𝑄𝐾𝑉𝛾Q,K,V,\gamma are the same as in Equation (5).
items.zh: 其中Q、K、V、γ与公式(5)中的相同。

items.en: A hybrid form of parallel representation and recurrent representation is available to accelerate training, especially for long sequences. We divide the input sequences into chunks. Within each chunk, we follow the parallel representation (Equation (5)) to conduct computation. In contrast, cross-chunk information is passed following the recurrent representation (Equation (LABEL:eq:ret:recurrent)). Specifically, let B𝐵B denote the chunk length. We compute the retention output of the i𝑖i-th chunk via:
items.zh: 并行表示和循环表示的混合形式可用于加速训练，特别是对于长序列。我们将输入序列分成块。在每个块内，我们遵循并行表示（公式(5)）进行计算。相反，跨块信息则按照循环表示（公式(LABEL:eq:ret:recurrent)）传递。具体来说，令B表示块长度。我们通过以下方式计算第i个块的保留输出：

items.en: where [i]delimited-[]𝑖{[i]} indicates the i𝑖i-th chunk, i.e., x[i]=[x(i−1)​B+1,⋯,xi​B]subscript𝑥delimited-[]𝑖subscript𝑥𝑖1𝐵1⋯subscript𝑥𝑖𝐵x_{[i]}=[x_{(i-1)B+1},\cdots,x_{iB}].
items.zh: 其中[i]表示第i个块，即x[i]=[x(i-1)B+1, ..., xiB]。

items.en: We use h=dmodel/dℎsubscript𝑑model𝑑h=\nicefrac{{d_{\text{model}}}}{{d}} retention heads in each layer, where d𝑑d is the head dimension. The heads use different parameter matrices WQ,WK,WV∈ℝd×dsubscript𝑊𝑄subscript𝑊𝐾subscript𝑊𝑉superscriptℝ𝑑𝑑W_{Q},W_{K},W_{V}\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times d}. Moreover, multi-scale retention (MSR) assigns different γ𝛾\gamma for each head. For simplicity, we set γ𝛾\gamma identical among different layers and keep them fixed. In addition, we add a swishswish\mathrm{swish} gate [14, 28] to increase the non-linearity of retention layers. Formally, given input X𝑋X, we define the layer as:
items.zh: 我们在每一层使用h=dmodel/d个保留头，其中d是头的维度。这些头使用不同的参数矩阵WQ、WK、WV∈ℝd×d。此外，多尺度保留（MSR）为每个头分配不同的γ。为简单起见，我们在不同层之间设置相同的γ并保持固定。此外，我们添加了一个swish门[14, 28]以增加保留层的非线性。形式上，给定输入X，我们将该层定义为：

items.en: where WG,WO∈ℝdmodel×dmodelsubscript𝑊𝐺subscript𝑊𝑂superscriptℝsubscript𝑑modelsubscript𝑑modelW_{G},W_{O}\in\mathbb{R}^{d_{\text{model}}\times d_{\text{model}}} are learnable parameters, and GroupNormGroupNorm\mathrm{GroupNorm} [35] normalizes the output of each head, following SubLN proposed in [32]. Notice that the heads use multiple γ𝛾\gamma scales, which results in different variance statistics. So we normalize the head outputs separately.
items.zh: 其中WG、WO∈ℝdmodel×dmodel是可学习参数，GroupNorm[35]对每个头的输出进行归一化，遵循[32]中提出的SubLN。注意，这些头使用多个γ尺度，这导致不同的方差统计。因此，我们分别对头输出进行归一化。

items.en: The pseudocode of retention is summarized in Figure 4.
items.zh: 保留的伪代码总结在图4中。

items.en:
We utilize the scale-invariant nature of GroupNormGroupNorm\mathrm{GroupNorm} to improve the numerical precision of retention layers. Specifically, multiplying a scalar value within GroupNormGroupNorm\mathrm{GroupNorm} does not affect outputs and backward gradients, i.e., GroupNorm​(α∗headi)=GroupNorm​(headi)GroupNorm𝛼subscripthead𝑖GroupNormsubscripthead𝑖\mathrm{GroupNorm}(\alpha*\mathrm{head}_{i})=\mathrm{GroupNorm}(\mathrm{head}_{i}). We implement three normalization factors in Equation (5). First, we normalize Q​K⊺𝑄superscript𝐾⊺QK^{\intercal} as Q​K⊺/d𝑄superscript𝐾⊺𝑑
icefrac{{QK^{\intercal}}}{{\sqrt{d}}}. Second, we replace D𝐷D with D~n​m=Dn​m/∑i=1nDn​isubscript~𝐷𝑛𝑚subscript𝐷𝑛𝑚superscriptsubscript𝑖1𝑛subscript𝐷𝑛𝑖	ilde{D}_{nm}=
icefrac{{D_{nm}}}{{\sqrt{\sum_{i=1}^{n}D_{ni}}}}. Third, let R𝑅R denote the retention scores R=Q​K⊺⊙D𝑅direct-product𝑄superscript𝐾⊺𝐷R=QK^{\intercal}\odot D, we normalize it as R~n​m=Rn​m/max⁡(|∑i=1nRn​i|,1)subscript~𝑅𝑛𝑚subscript𝑅𝑛𝑚superscriptsubscript𝑖1𝑛subscript𝑅𝑛𝑖1	ilde{R}_{nm}=
icefrac{{R_{nm}}}{{\max(|\sum_{i=1}^{n}R_{ni}|,1)}}. Then the retention output becomes Retention​(X)=R~​VRetention𝑋~𝑅𝑉\mathrm{Retention}(X)=	ilde{R}V. The above tricks do not affect the final results while stabilizing the numerical flow of both forward and backward passes, because of the scale-invariant property.
items.zh: 我们利用GroupNorm的尺度不变性来提高保留层的数值精度。具体来说，在GroupNorm内乘以一个标量值不会影响输出和反向梯度，即GroupNorm(α*headi)=GroupNorm(headi)。我们在公式(5)中实现了三个归一化因子。首先，我们将QK⊺归一化为QK⊺/√d。其次，我们将D替换为D̃nm=Dnm/√(∑i=1n Dni)。第三，令R表示保留分数R=QK⊺⊙D，我们将其归一化为R̃nm=Rnm/max(|∑i=1n Rni|,1)。然后保留输出变为Retention(X)=R̃V。上述技巧不会影响最终结果，同时稳定了前向和反向传播的数值流，这是由于尺度不变性。

items.en: For an L𝐿L-layer retention network, we stack multi-scale retention (MSR) and feed-forward network (FFN) to build the model. Formally, the input sequence {xi}i=1|x|superscriptsubscriptsubscript𝑥𝑖𝑖1𝑥\{x_{i}\}_{i=1}^{|x|} is transformed to vectors by a word embedding layer. We use the packed embeddings X0=[𝒙1,⋯,𝒙|x|]∈ℝ|x|×dmodelsuperscript𝑋0subscript𝒙1⋯subscript𝒙𝑥superscriptℝ𝑥subscript𝑑modelX^{0}=[{\bm{x}}_{1},\cdots,{\bm{x}}_{|x|}]\in\mathbb{R}^{|x|\times d_{\text{model}}} as the input and compute the model output XLsuperscript𝑋𝐿X^{L}:
items.zh: 对于一个L层保留网络，我们堆叠多尺度保留（MSR）和前馈网络（FFN）来构建模型。形式上，输入序列{xi}i=1|x|通过词嵌入层转换为向量。我们使用打包的嵌入X0=[x1, ..., x|x|]∈ℝ|x|×dmodel作为输入，并计算模型输出XL：

items.en: where LN​(⋅)LN⋅\mathrm{LN}(\cdot) is LayerNorm [1]. The FFN part is computed as FFN​(X)=gelu​(X​W1)​W2FFN𝑋gelu𝑋subscript𝑊1subscript𝑊2\mathrm{FFN}(X)=\mathrm{gelu}(XW_{1})W_{2}, where W1,W2subscript𝑊1subscript𝑊2W_{1},W_{2} are parameter matrices.
items.zh: 其中LN(·)是LayerNorm[1]。FFN部分计算为FFN(X)=gelu(XW1)W2，其中W1、W2是参数矩阵。

items.en: We use the parallel (Equation (5)) and chunkwise recurrent (Equation (7)) representations during the training process. The parallelization within sequences or chunks efficiently utilizes GPUs to accelerate computation. More favorably, chunkwise recurrence is especially useful for long-sequence training, which is efficient in terms of both FLOPs and memory consumption.
items.zh: 在训练过程中，我们使用并行（公式(5)）和分块循环（公式(7)）表示。序列内或块内的并行化高效地利用GPU加速计算。更有利的是，分块循环对于长序列训练特别有用，在FLOPs和内存消耗方面都很高效。

items.en: The recurrent representation (Equation (LABEL:eq:ret:recurrent)) is employed during the inference, which nicely fits autoregressive decoding. The O​(1)𝑂1O(1) complexity reduces memory and inference latency while achieving equivalent results.
items.zh: 在推理过程中使用循环表示（公式(LABEL:eq:ret:recurrent)），这非常适合自回归解码。O(1)复杂度减少了内存和推理延迟，同时实现了等效的结果。

full.sec: 2.4 Relation to and Differences from Previous Methods
full.secZh: 2.4 与先前方法的关系与区别

items.en: The parallel representation of retention shares similar spirits as Transformers [34]. The most related Transformer variant is Lex Transformer [29] which implements xPos as position embeddings. As described in Equation (3), the derivation of retention aligns with xPos. In comparison with attention, retention removes softmaxsoftmax\mathrm{softmax} and enables recurrent formulation, which significantly benefits inference.
items.zh: 保留的并行表示与Transformer[34]有相似的精神。最相关的Transformer变体是Lex Transformer[29]，它实现了xPos作为位置嵌入。如公式(3)所述，保留的推导与xPos一致。与注意力机制相比，保留移除了softmax并实现了循环公式，这显著有利于推理。

items.en: Unlike Equation (2), if Qnsubscript𝑄𝑛Q_{n} and Knsubscript𝐾𝑛K_{n} are content-unaware, the formulation can be degenerated to S4 [11], where O=(QK⊺,QAK⊺,..,QA|x|−1K⊺)∗VO=(QK^{\intercal},QAK^{\intercal},..,QA^{|x|-1}K^{\intercal})*V.
items.zh: 与公式(2)不同，如果Qn和Kn与内容无关，则该公式可以退化为S4[11]，其中O=(QK⊺, QAK⊺, ..., QA|x|-1K⊺)*V。

items.en: The variants typically use various kernels ϕ​(qi)​ϕ​(kj)/∑n=1|x|ϕ​(qi)​ϕ​(kn)italic-ϕsubscript𝑞𝑖italic-ϕsubscript𝑘𝑗superscriptsubscript𝑛1𝑥italic-ϕsubscript𝑞𝑖italic-ϕsubscript𝑘𝑛\nicefrac{{\phi(q_{i})\phi(k_{j})}}{{\sum_{n=1}^{|x|}\phi(q_{i})\phi(k_{n})}} to replace the softmaxsoftmax\mathrm{softmax} function. However, linear attention struggles to effectively encode position information, rendering the models less performant. Besides, we reexamine sequence modeling from scratch, rather than aiming at approximating softmaxsoftmax\mathrm{softmax}.
items.zh: 这些变体通常使用各种核φ(qi)φ(kj)/∑n=1|x| φ(qi)φ(kn)来替代softmax函数。然而，线性注意力难以有效编码位置信息，导致模型性能较差。此外，我们从头重新审视序列建模，而不是旨在近似softmax。

items.en: Attention Free Transformer (AFT) simplifies dot-product attention to element-wise operations and moves softmaxsoftmax\mathrm{softmax} to key vectors. RWKV replaces AFT’s position embeddings with exponential decay and runs the models recurrently for training and inference. In comparison, retention preserves high-dimensional states to encode sequence information, which contributes to expressive ability and better performance.
items.zh: 无注意力Transformer（AFT）将点积注意力简化为逐元素操作，并将softmax移到键向量上。RWKV用指数衰减替换AFT的位置嵌入，并循环运行模型进行训练和推理。相比之下，保留保留了高维状态来编码序列信息，这有助于表达能力和更好的性能。

items.en: Compared with relative position embedding methods proposed for Transformers, Equation 3 presents a similar formulation as xPos [29] and RoPE [31].
items.zh: 与为Transformer提出的相对位置嵌入方法相比，公式3提出了与xPos[29]和RoPE[31]类似的公式。

items.en: As shown in Equation (8), the retention layer uses Sub-LayerNorm [37] to normalize outputs. Because the multi-scale modeling leads to different variances for the heads, we replace the original LayerNorm with GroupNorm.
items.zh: 如公式(8)所示，保留层使用子层归一化[37]对输出进行归一化。由于多尺度建模导致不同注意力头的方差不同，我们将原始层归一化替换为组归一化。

items.en: We conduct experiments on language modeling to evaluate RetNet. We evaluate the proposed architecture with various benchmarks, i.e., language modeling performance, and zero-/few-shot learning on downstream tasks. Moreover, for training and inference, we compare speed, memory consumption, and latency.
items.zh: 我们在语言建模任务上对RetNet进行评估。我们使用多种基准测试评估所提出的架构，包括语言建模性能以及下游任务的零样本/少样本学习。此外，在训练和推理方面，我们比较了速度、内存消耗和延迟。

items.en: We re-allocate the parameters in MSR and FFN for fair comparisons. Let d𝑑d denote dmodelsubscript𝑑modeld_{\text{model}} for simplicity here. In Transformers, there are about 4​d24superscript𝑑24d^{2} parameters in self-attention where WQ,WK,WV,WO∈ℝd×dsubscript𝑊𝑄subscript𝑊𝐾subscript𝑊𝑉subscript𝑊𝑂superscriptℝ𝑑𝑑W_{Q},W_{K},W_{V},W_{O}\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times d}, and 8​d28superscript𝑑28d^{2} parameters in FFN where the intermediate dimension is 4​d4𝑑4d. In comparison, RetNet has 8​d28superscript𝑑28d^{2} parameters in retention, where WQ,WK∈ℝd×d,WG,WV∈ℝd×2​d,WO∈ℝ2​d×dformulae-sequencesubscript𝑊𝑄subscript𝑊𝐾superscriptℝ𝑑𝑑subscript𝑊𝐺subscript𝑊𝑉superscriptℝ𝑑2𝑑subscript𝑊𝑂superscriptℝ2𝑑𝑑W_{Q},W_{K}\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times d},W_{G},W_{V}\in\mathbb{R}^{d\times 2d},W_{O}\in\mathbb{R}^{2d\times d}. Notice that the head dimension of V𝑉V is twice Q,K𝑄𝐾Q,K. The widened dimension is projected back to d𝑑d by WOsubscript𝑊𝑂W_{O}. In order to keep the parameter number the same as Transformer, the FFN intermediate dimension in RetNet is 2​d2𝑑2d. Meanwhile, we set the head dimension to 256256256 in our experiments, i.e., 256256256 for queries and keys, and 512512512 for values. For fair comparison, we keep γ𝛾\mathbf{\gamma} identical among different model sizes, where γ=1−elinspace​(log⁡1/32,log⁡1/512,h)∈ℝh𝛾1superscript𝑒linspace1321512ℎsuperscriptℝℎ\mathbf{\gamma}=1-e^{\mathrm{linspace}(\log\nicefrac{{1}}{{32}},\log\nicefrac{{1}}{{512}},h)}\in\mathbb{R}^{h} instead of the default value in Equation (8).
items.zh: 为了公平比较，我们重新分配了MSR和FFN中的参数。为简化起见，此处用d表示d_model。在Transformer中，自注意力机制约有4d²个参数，其中W_Q、W_K、W_V、W_O ∈ ℝ^{d×d}，FFN约有8d²个参数，其中中间维度为4d。相比之下，RetNet的保留机制有8d²个参数，其中W_Q、W_K ∈ ℝ^{d×d}，W_G、W_V ∈ ℝ^{d×2d}，W_O ∈ ℝ^{2d×d}。注意V的注意力头维度是Q、K的两倍。加宽的维度通过W_O投影回d。为了保持参数数量与Transformer相同，RetNet中FFN的中间维度设为2d。同时，我们在实验中设置注意力头维度为256，即查询和键为256，值为512。为了公平比较，我们在不同模型大小下保持γ相同，其中γ = 1 - e^{linspace(log 1/32, log 1/512, h)} ∈ ℝ^h，而非公式(8)中的默认值。

items.en: As shown in Table 2, we train language models with various sizes (i.e., 1.3B, 2.7B, and 6.7B) from scratch. The training corpus is a curated compilation of The Pile [10], C4 [9], and The Stack [18]. We append the <bos> token to indicate the start of a sequence111We find that appending the <bos> token at the beginning benefits training stability and performance.. The training batch size is 4M tokens with 2048 maximal length. We train the models with 100B tokens, i.e., 25k steps. We use the AdamW [21] optimizer with β1=0.9,β2=0.98formulae-sequencesubscript𝛽10.9subscript𝛽20.98\beta_{1}=0.9,\beta_{2}=0.98, and weight decay is set to 0.050.050.05. The number of warmup steps is 375 with linear learning rate decay. The parameters are initialized following DeepNet [36] to guarantee training stability. The implementation is based on TorchScale [23]. We train the models with 512 AMD MI200 GPUs.
items.zh: 如表2所示，我们从零开始训练不同规模（即1.3B、2.7B和6.7B）的语言模型。训练语料是The Pile [10]、C4 [9]和The Stack [18]的精选汇编。我们添加<bos>标记表示序列开始¹。训练批次大小为4M个token，最大长度为2048。我们使用100B个token训练模型，即25k步。我们使用AdamW [21]优化器，β₁=0.9，β₂=0.98，权重衰减设为0.05。预热步数为375，采用线性学习率衰减。参数按照DeepNet [36]初始化以保证训练稳定性。实现基于TorchScale [23]。我们使用512个AMD MI200 GPU训练模型。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Perplexity decreases along with scaling up the model size. We empirically observe that RetNet tends to outperform Transformer when the model size is larger than 2B.
items.capZh: 图5：困惑度随模型规模增大而降低。我们根据经验观察到，当模型规模大于2B时，RetNet往往优于Transformer。

items.en: As shown in Figure 5, we report perplexity on the validation set for the language models based on Transformer and RetNet. We present the scaling curves with three model sizes, i.e., 1.3B, 2.7B, and 6.7B. RetNet achieves comparable results with Transformers. More importantly, the results indicate that RetNet is favorable regarding size scaling. Besides performance, the RetNet training is quite stable in our experiments. Experimental results show that RetNet is a strong competitor to Transformer for large language models. Empirically, we find that RetNet starts to outperform Transformer when the model size is larger than 2B. We also summarize the language modeling results with different context lengths in Appendix B.
items.zh: 如图5所示，我们报告了基于Transformer和RetNet的语言模型在验证集上的困惑度。我们展示了三种模型规模（1.3B、2.7B和6.7B）的缩放曲线。RetNet取得了与Transformer相当的结果。更重要的是，结果表明RetNet在规模缩放方面具有优势。除了性能，RetNet的训练在我们的实验中非常稳定。实验结果表明，RetNet是大型语言模型中Transformer的有力竞争者。根据经验，我们发现当模型规模大于2B时，RetNet开始优于Transformer。我们还在附录B中总结了不同上下文长度下的语言建模结果。

items.en: We also compare the language models on a wide range of downstream tasks. We evaluate zero-shot and 4-shot learning with the 6.7B models. As shown in Table 3, the datasets include HellaSwag (HS) [39], BoolQ [6], COPA [38], PIQA [3], Winograd, Winogrande [20], and StoryCloze (SC) [22]. The accuracy numbers are consistent with language modeling perplexity presented in Figure 5. RetNet achieves comparable performance with Transformer on zero-shot and in-context learning settings.
items.zh: 我们还在广泛的下游任务上比较了语言模型。我们使用6.7B模型评估了零样本和4样本学习。如表3所示，数据集包括HellaSwag (HS) [39]、BoolQ [6]、COPA [38]、PIQA [3]、Winograd、Winogrande [20]和StoryCloze (SC) [22]。准确率数字与图5中显示的语言建模困惑度一致。RetNet在零样本和上下文学习设置下取得了与Transformer相当的性能。

items.en: As shown in Table 4, we compare the training speed and memory consumption of Transformer and RetNet, where the training sequence length is 8192. We also compare with FlashAttention [7], which improves speed and reduces GPU memory IO by recomputation and kernel fusion. In comparison, we implement RetNet using vanilla PyTorch code, and leave kernel fusion or FlashAttention-like acceleration for future work. We use chunkwise recurrent representation of retention as described in Equation (7). The chunk size is set to 512512512. We evaluate the results with eight Nvidia A100-80GB GPUs, because FlashAttention is highly optimized for A100. Tensor parallelism is enabled for 6.7B and 13B models.
items.zh: 如表4所示，我们比较了Transformer和RetNet的训练速度和内存消耗，其中训练序列长度为8192。我们还与FlashAttention [7]进行了比较，后者通过重计算和内核融合提高了速度并减少了GPU内存IO。相比之下，我们使用原生PyTorch代码实现RetNet，将内核融合或类似FlashAttention的加速留待未来工作。我们使用公式(7)中描述的保留的分块循环表示。块大小设为512。我们使用八块Nvidia A100-80GB GPU评估结果，因为FlashAttention针对A100进行了高度优化。6.7B和13B模型启用了张量并行。

items.en: Experimental results show that RetNet is more memory-efficient and has higher throughput than Transformers during training. Even compared with FlashAttention, RetNet is still competitive in terms of speed and memory cost. Moreover, without relying on specific kernels, it is easy to train RetNet on other platforms efficiently. For example, we train the RetNet models on an AMD MI200 cluster with decent throughput. It is notable that RetNet has the potential to further reduce cost via advanced implementation, such as kernel fusion.
items.zh: 实验结果表明，RetNet在训练期间比Transformer更节省内存且具有更高的吞吐量。即使与FlashAttention相比，RetNet在速度和内存成本方面仍具有竞争力。此外，无需依赖特定内核，RetNet可以轻松在其他平台上高效训练。例如，我们在AMD MI200集群上训练RetNet模型，吞吐量可观。值得注意的是，RetNet有潜力通过高级实现（如内核融合）进一步降低成本。

items.capEn: (a) GPU memory cost of Transformer and RetNet.
(c) Inference latency with different batch sizes.
items.capZh: (c) 不同批次大小下的推理延迟。

items.en: As shown in Figure 6, we compare memory cost, throughput, and latency of Transformer and RetNet during inference. Transformers reuse KV caches of previously decoded tokens. RetNet uses the recurrent representation as described in Equation (LABEL:eq:ret:recurrent). We evaluate the 6.7B model on the A100-80GB GPU in our experiments. Figure 6 shows that RetNet outperforms Transformer in terms of inference cost.
items.zh: 如图6所示，我们比较了Transformer和RetNet在推理期间的内存成本、吞吐量和延迟。Transformer重用先前解码token的KV缓存。RetNet使用公式(LABEL:eq:ret:recurrent)中描述的循环表示。我们在实验中在A100-80GB GPU上评估了6.7B模型。图6显示RetNet在推理成本方面优于Transformer。

items.en: As shown in Figure 6(a), the memory cost of Transformer increases linearly due to KV caches. In contrast, the memory consumption of RetNet remains consistent even for long sequences, requiring much less GPU memory to host RetNet. The additional memory consumption of RetNet is almost negligible (i.e., about 3%) while the model weights occupy 97%.
items.zh: 如图6(a)所示，由于KV缓存，Transformer的内存成本线性增加。相比之下，RetNet的内存消耗即使在长序列下也保持一致，所需GPU内存远少于Transformer。RetNet的额外内存消耗几乎可以忽略不计（约3%），而模型权重占97%。

items.en: As presented in Figure 6(b), the throughput of Transformer drops along with the decoding length increases. In comparison, RetNet has higher and length-invariant throughput during decoding, by utilizing the recurrent representation of retention.
items.zh: 如图6(b)所示，Transformer的吞吐量随解码长度增加而下降。相比之下，RetNet通过利用保留的循环表示，在解码期间具有更高且与长度无关的吞吐量。

items.en: Latency is an important metric in deployment, which greatly affects user experience. We report decoding latency in Figure 6(c). Experimental results show that increasing batch size renders Transformer’s latency larger. Moreover, the latency of Transformers grows faster with longer input. In order to make latency acceptable, we have to restrict the batch size, which harms the overall inference throughput of Transformers. By contrast, RetNet’s decoding latency outperforms Transformers and keeps almost the same across different batch sizes and input lengths.
items.zh: 延迟是部署中的重要指标，极大地影响用户体验。我们在图6(c)中报告了解码延迟。实验结果表明，增加批次大小会使Transformer的延迟变大。此外，Transformer的延迟随输入变长而增长更快。为了使延迟可接受，我们必须限制批次大小，这损害了Transformer的整体推理吞吐量。相比之下，RetNet的解码延迟优于Transformer，并且在不同的批次大小和输入长度下几乎保持不变。

items.en: Apart from Transformer, we compare RetNet with various efficient Transformer variants, including Linear Transformer [19], RWKV [25], H3 [8], and Hyena [26]. All models have 200M parameters with 16 layers and a hidden dimension of 1024. For H3, we set the head dimension as 8. For RWKV, we use the TimeMix module to substitute self-attention layers while keeping FFN layers consistent with other models for fair comparisons. We train the models with 10k steps with a batch size of 0.5M tokens. Most hyperparameters and training corpora are kept the same as in Section 3.1.
items.zh: 除了Transformer，我们还将RetNet与各种高效的Transformer变体进行了比较，包括Linear Transformer [19]、RWKV [25]、H3 [8]和Hyena [26]。所有模型均有200M参数，16层，隐藏维度1024。对于H3，我们设置注意力头维度为8。对于RWKV，我们使用TimeMix模块替代自注意力层，同时保持FFN层与其他模型一致以进行公平比较。我们训练模型10k步，批次大小为0.5M个token。大多数超参数和训练语料与第3.1节保持一致。

items.en: In addition, we discuss the training and inference efficiency of the compared methods. Let d𝑑d denote the hidden dimension, and n𝑛n the sequence length. For training, RWKV’s token-mixing complexity is O​(d​n)𝑂𝑑𝑛O(dn) while Hyena’s is O​(d​n​log⁡n)𝑂𝑑𝑛𝑛O(dn\log n) with Fast Fourier Transform acceleration. The above two methods reduce training FLOPS via employing element-wise operators to trade-off modeling capacity. In comparison with retention, the chunk-wise recurrent representation is O​(d​n​(b+h))𝑂𝑑𝑛𝑏ℎO(dn(b+h)), where b𝑏b is the chunk size, hℎh is the head dimension, and we usually set b=512,h=256formulae-sequence𝑏512ℎ256b=512,h=256. For either large model size (i.e., larger d𝑑d) or sequence length, the additional b+h𝑏ℎb+h has negligible effects. So the RetNet training is quite efficient without sacrificing the modeling performance. For inference, among the compared efficient architectures, Hyena has the same complexity (i.e., O​(n)𝑂𝑛O(n) per step) as Transformer while the others can perform O​(1)𝑂1O(1) decoding.
items.zh: 此外，我们讨论了所比较方法的训练和推理效率。设d为隐藏维度，n为序列长度。对于训练，RWKV的token混合复杂度为O(dn)，而Hyena通过快速傅里叶变换加速为O(dn log n)。上述两种方法通过使用逐元素算子来降低训练FLOPS，以牺牲建模能力为代价。相比之下，保留的分块循环表示为O(dn(b+h))，其中b是块大小，h是注意力头维度，我们通常设置b=512，h=256。对于大模型规模（即更大的d）或序列长度，额外的b+h影响可忽略不计。因此，RetNet训练非常高效，且不牺牲建模性能。对于推理，在所比较的高效架构中，Hyena与Transformer具有相同的复杂度（即每步O(n)），而其他架构可以实现O(1)解码。

items.en: We ablate various design choices of RetNet and report the language modeling results in Table 6. The evaluation settings and metrics are the same as in Section 3.5.
items.zh: 我们对RetNet的各种设计选择进行了消融实验，并在表6中报告了语言建模结果。评估设置和指标与第3.5节相同。

items.en: We ablate the swishswish\mathrm{swish} gate and GroupNormGroupNorm\mathrm{GroupNorm} as described in Equation 8. Table 6 shows that the above two components improve the final performance. Firstly, the gating module is essential for enhancing non-linearity and improving model capability. Notice that we use the same parameter allocation as Transformers after removing the gate. Secondly, group normalization in retention balances the variances of multi-head outputs, which improves training stability and language modeling results.
items.zh: 我们对公式(8)中描述的swish门控和组归一化进行了消融实验。表6显示上述两个组件提升了最终性能。首先，门控模块对于增强非线性和提高模型能力至关重要。注意，在移除门控后，我们使用了与Transformer相同的参数分配。其次，保留机制中的组归一化平衡了多头输出的方差，提高了训练稳定性和语言建模结果。

items.en: Equation 8 shows that we use different γ𝛾\mathbf{\gamma} as the decay rates for the retention heads. In the ablation studies, we examine removing γ𝛾\gamma decay (i.e., “−- γ𝛾\gamma decay”) and applying the same decay rate across heads (i.e., “−- multi-scale decay”). Specifically, ablating γ𝛾\gamma decay is equivalent to γ=1𝛾1\gamma=1. In the second setting, we set γ=127/128𝛾127128\gamma=127/128 for all heads. Table 6 indicates that both the decay mechanism and using multiple decay rates can improve the language modeling performance.
items.zh: 方程8显示，我们对保留头使用了不同的γ作为衰减率。在消融研究中，我们考察了移除γ衰减（即“− γ衰减”）和对所有头应用相同衰减率（即“− 多尺度衰减”）的情况。具体来说，消融γ衰减等价于γ=1。在第二种设置中，我们对所有头设置γ=127/128。表6表明，衰减机制和使用多个衰减率都能提高语言建模性能。

items.en: From the recurrent perspective of LABEL:eq:rnn, the head dimension implies the memory capacity of hidden states. In the ablation study, we reduce the default head dimension from 256256256 to 646464, i.e., 646464 for queries and keys, and 128128128 for values. We keep the hidden dimension dmodelsubscript𝑑modeld_{\text{model}} the same so the number of heads increases. Experimental results in Table 6 show that the larger head dimension achieves better performance.
items.zh: 从LABEL:eq:rnn的循环视角来看，头维度隐含了隐藏状态的记忆容量。在消融研究中，我们将默认头维度从256减少到64，即查询和键为64，值为128。我们保持隐藏维度d_model不变，因此头的数量增加。表6的实验结果表明，更大的头维度实现了更好的性能。

items.en: In this work, we propose retentive networks (RetNet) for sequence modeling, which enables various representations, i.e., parallel, recurrent, and chunkwise recurrent. RetNet achieves significantly better inference efficiency (in terms of memory, speed, and latency), favorable training parallelization, and competitive performance compared with Transformers. The above advantages make RetNet an ideal successor to Transformers for large language models, especially considering the deployment benefits brought by the O​(1)𝑂1O(1) inference complexity. In the future, we would like to scale up RetNet in terms of model size [5] and training steps. Moreover, retention can efficiently work with structured prompting [17] by compressing long-term memory. We will also use RetNet as the backbone architecture to train multimodal large language models [16, 13, 27]. In addition, we are interested in deploying RetNet models on various edge devices, such as mobile phones.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了用于序列建模的保留网络（RetNet），它支持多种表示形式，即并行、循环和分块循环。与Transformer相比，RetNet实现了显著更好的推理效率（在内存、速度和延迟方面）、有利的训练并行化以及有竞争力的性能。上述优势使RetNet成为大型语言模型中Transformer的理想继任者，特别是考虑到O(1)推理复杂度带来的部署优势。未来，我们希望在模型规模[5]和训练步数上扩展RetNet。此外，保留机制可以通过压缩长期记忆与结构化提示[17]高效协作。我们还将使用RetNet作为骨干架构来训练多模态大语言模型[16, 13, 27]。另外，我们有兴趣在各种边缘设备（如手机）上部署RetNet模型。

items.en: We would like to acknowledge Jiayu Ding, Songlin Yang, and colleagues from MSRA System Group for the helpful discussions.
items.zh: 我们感谢Jiayu Ding、Songlin Yang以及MSRA系统组的同事们进行的有益讨论。
